# Cariak v1.3.0 — Deep Research Agent
> Multi-source research (internet, social, academic, news, market) with Pocketto-inspired skill pipeline and dialectic advisor at every phase. Bilingual ID+EN.

## Install
```bash
npx skills add EgiStr/cariak
npx cariak-pi setup
npx cariak-pi doctor
```

## Pipeline (8 skills + 7 advisor gates)
cariak-pitching → [advisor: Devil's Advocate] → cariak-grinding → [advisor: Methodologist + Skeptic] → cariak-planning → [advisor: System Architect] → cariak-researching → [advisor: Domain Expert ×5] → cariak-synthesizing → [advisor: Contradiction Hunter] → cariak-validating → [advisor: Falsificationist] → cariak-reflecting → [advisor: Blind Spot Auditor] → cariak-remembering

## Core Philosophy
THESIS → ANTITHESIS → SYNTHESIS at every phase. 7 independent advisor personas challenge every output. No self-critique — all challenges via independent sub-agents to prevent confirmation bias.

## Advisor Persona Rotation
| Phase | Advisor | Challenge |
|---|---|---|
| Pitching | Devil's Advocate | "What blind spots? What untested assumptions?" |
| Grinding | Methodologist + Skeptic | "Are GWT scenarios truly testable? Edge cases?" |
| Planning | System Architect | "Hidden dependencies? Are tasks independent?" |
| Researching | Domain Expert (×5) | "Is this finding biased? Counter-evidence?" |
| Synthesizing | Contradiction Hunter | "Where do sources disagree? Cherry-picking?" |
| Validating | Falsificationist (Popper) | "How to PROVE each claim wrong?" |
| Reflecting | Blind Spot Auditor | "What did we NOT research?" |

## Trigger Phrases
"cariak", "research this", "deep research", "gali ini", "cariak ini", "I want to explore", "teliti ini"

## Hard Gates
- Clarify Gate (pitching): Problem must be clearly defined before grinding
- Advisor Gates (every phase): Advisor challenge mandatory before advancing
- Quality Gate (reflecting): Output must pass confidence/bias/source-coverage/blind-spot checks
- Validation Gate (validating): Every claim must have a source (Iron Law)

## Sub-agents (5, run in parallel)
- internet-researcher (web-search-mcp, tavily, playwright)
- social-researcher (web-search-mcp: Reddit/HN/X)
- academic-researcher (paper-search-mcp, Semantic Scholar, arXiv)
- news-researcher (tavily, web-search-mcp: news)
- market-researcher (tavily, web-search-mcp, playwright)

## Output Format
- Primary: DOCX (professional-grade) via `npx cariak-pi report --template research-report`
- Fallback: MD (plain text) via `npx cariak-pi report --template research-report --format md`

## Always-On Outputs
- research-report.docx (primary) / research-report.md (fallback) — main synthesis document
- references.json — structured citation graph

## On-Demand Document Templates (12)
prd, tech-spec, adr, competitive-analysis, risk-register, literature-review,
experiment-design, feasibility-study, implementation-roadmap, research-proposal,
technical-report, recommendation-report

## Required MCP Servers
web-search-mcp, paper-search-mcp, tavily, fetch, playwright, memory, github, context7

## Reference CSVs (8)
advisor-phase-mapping (NEW), advisor-personas, brainstorming-methods, citation-standards, coverage-matrix, question-frameworks, research-methods, source-taxonomy

## File Structure
```
cariak/
├── skills/         # 8 SKILL.md (pipeline phases)
├── advisors/       # 7 advisor persona sub-agents (NEW)
├── subagents/      # 5 researcher sub-agents
├── templates/      # 14 output document templates (DOCX + MD)
├── references/     # 8 CSV + 5 MD/YAML reference files
├── cli/            # cariak-pi CLI (setup, doctor, bundle, validate, report)
├── assets/         # logos, branding
├── docs/
│   ├── examples/   # example research outputs
│   └── architecture.md  # full architecture doc
├── package.json    # npm package config
├── llms.txt        # this file
├── README.md       # English docs
├── README.id.md    # Indonesian docs
├── CHANGELOG.md    # version history
├── CONTRIBUTING.md
└── LICENSE
```

## Key URLs
- GitHub: https://github.com/EgiStr/cariak
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/cariak
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/EgiStr/cariak/issues
- Skill registry: npx skills add EgiStr/cariak
